name: 9M338 (SA-15 Tor)
description: Russian short-range vertical-launch SHORAD missile fired by the SA-15 Tor system. Real 9M338 is command-guided through midcourse with active-radar terminal; for sim purposes we run it as a short-range AMRAAM-class active radar (the visual + envelope distinction matters more than the seeker philosophy until Phase 6e adds command-link severance). ~16 km kinematic range, Mach 2.8 peak, 15 kg blast-frag warhead. Visual stand-in: Tamir Iron Dome interceptor model — both ~3 m, similar SHORAD silhouette.
